subcodes.first_line: O kind friends! It is dawn, and 'Abdu'l-Bahá hath quaffed the morning draught from the wine of the love of God, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان صبح است و عبدالبهاء جام صبوحی از باده محبت الله زده و در
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom
